psychologist_agenda_exceptions_kind_time.name: psychologist_agenda_exceptions_kind_times
psychologist_agenda_exceptions_kind_time.value:
(
        (kind = 'INACTIVE_DAY' AND start_time IS NULL AND end_time IS NULL)
        OR
        (kind = 'INACTIVE_INTERVAL' AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time > start_time)
        OR
        (kind = 'ACTIVE_OVERRIDE_INTERVAL' AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time > start_time)
      )

psychologist_appointments_modality_addre.name: psychologist_appointments_modality_address
psychologist_appointments_modality_addre.value:
(
        (modality = 'ONLINE' AND address_id IS NULL) OR
        (modality = 'PRESENTIAL' AND address_id IS NOT NULL)
      )

psychologist_schedule_blocks_modality_ad.name: psychologist_schedule_blocks_modality_address
psychologist_schedule_blocks_modality_ad.value:
(
        (modality = 'ONLINE' AND address_id IS NULL) OR
        (modality = 'PRESENTIAL' AND address_id IS NOT NULL)
      )

psychologist_weekly_availability_modalit.name: psychologist_weekly_availability_modality_address
psychologist_weekly_availability_modalit.value:
(
        (modality = 'ONLINE' AND address_id IS NULL) OR
        (modality = 'PRESENTIAL' AND address_id IS NOT NULL)
      )
